subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers, like unto two celestial bodies! His honor Amín, through the strength of his heart, the loftiness of his purpose, and the sublimity of his virtues [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر مانند دو پیکر آسمانی جناب امین از قوت قلب و علو همت و سمو منقبت
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
